name: Ibrahim unique at 7
description: Ibrahim is the only prophet whose final digital root is 7
caveat: Haman = 7 breaks uniqueness in full corpus

name: Mosaic axis
description: Ishaq (170→8) → Yaqub (188→8) → Musa (116→8): three independent raw values, same final, lineage-coherent

name: Seal cluster
description: Sulayman (191→11→2), Yahya (38→11→2), Muhammad (92→11→2): identical two-step chains

name: Chain endpoints
description: Adam (first prophet, final=9) + Muhammad (last prophet, final=2) = 11 = Muhammad's master number

name: Adam = Isa frequency 25
description: Both Adam and Isa appear exactly 25 times in the Quran. Q 3:59 draws the parallel explicitly.

name: Ayyub raw value = 19
description: Ayyub = 19 unreduced. Q 74:30 'Over it are nineteen.'

name: Muhammad / מחמד cross-match
description: Arabic Abjad: محمد = 92, Hebrew Gematria: מחמד = 92. Song of Songs 5:16. Non-cognate, non-trivial.
